Winning gold in the first Olympics! 18-year-old rider Deng Yawen claimed China's first-ever Olympic gold in freestyle BMX cycling. Despite a late start and missing out on the Tokyo Olympics, how did China's BMX team achieve such a meteoric rise? David Lappartient, President of the International Cycling Union, highlighted the key factors: a dedicated athlete, a strong coach, and a global vision.
